title: 分类变更后的菜品缓存失效
requirement: 当菜品分类被创建、修改或删除时，保证按分类筛选的菜品缓存不会返回过期结果。
forbidden_claims: category writes currently invalidate a cache
human_review_notes: Category and Dish services are separate current modules. The case measures whether a proposal recognizes the cross-domain cache-invalidation boundary.
